name: nicolivelog
description: ニコ生コメント記録プロトタイプ（拡張）

scripts.verify: npm test && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run build && node scripts/run-e2e.mjs --headed tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:monkey: npm run build && node scripts/run-e2e.mjs --headed tests/e2e/popup-monkey.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:smoke-monkey: npm run build && node scripts/run-e2e.mjs --headed tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js tests/e2e/popup-monkey.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:interaction: npm run build && node scripts/run-e2e.mjs --headed tests/e2e/extension-interaction.spec.js
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run build && npx playwright test --ui
